tasks: From the analytic sample, what percentage of students reported food insecurity? Reply with only the numeric value rounded to one decimal place, nothing else.

Based on the results, what is the percentage increase in total units taken (including summer bridge) caused by attendance at the in-person version of the SB Program, relative to the control group baseline? Reply with only the numeric value rounded to the nearest integer, nothing else.
Based on the replication results, does a Kolmogorov-Smirnov test show that the distribution of summer grades differs significantly from school year grades at P < 0.001? Reply with only Yes or No.
